name: Mitigating The Effect of Class Imbalance in Data with Hierarchical and Dependable Structure

description: arXiv:2607.11994v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Classifying cybersecurity vulnerabilities using the Common Weakness Enumeration (CWE) taxonomy is challenging due to extreme class imbalance and strong hierarchical dependencies among weakness categories. Although oversampling techniques such as Synthetic Minority Oversampling Technique (SMOTE) and Adaptive Synthetic Sampling (ADASYN) are widely...
author: Bipin Chhetri, Deepika Giri, Avishek Kadel, Rabin Kumar Karki, Akbar Siami Namin
